Starting the scholarship application now builds a buffer against potential delays, reducing future stress without sacrificing any unique opportunities.

After 1.5 hours, I am at 62% progress on the scholarship application, leaving roughly 0.4 hours of work needed to complete it before the deadline.
I've reached 67% progress on the scholarship application after 1.5 hours, leaving less than an hour of work needed to finish before the three-day deadline.

I slept 6 hours and now have high energy, but the scholarship application is still at 73% with only about 0.2 hours left before the deadline.
The scholarship application is now fully complete, eliminating the immediate deadline pressure and allowing me to focus on other tasks.
The scholarship application is now fully complete, eliminating the immediate deadline pressure and freeing up my energy for other tasks.
I let the moment pass at 9:00 without acting, leaving my energy and stress unchanged despite having completed the scholarship application earlier.
